🍇

Annual Wine Country Excursion · Basecamp Campground

Palisade Wine Tour

July 11, 2026

Peaches, lavender & live music in Colorado wine country

I
The Essence of Terroir
Rooted in place, unhurried by pace — the soul of Palisade wine country
10:00 am
🔓
The Uncorking — Pick Your Pour or Pick Your Lavender
Deroco Cellars: 102 W 3rd St · Graystone Winery: Clifton · Sage Creations: 3555 E Rd, Mesa
Choose One Opens 9–10 am
Deroco Cellars — Palisade's multi-winery tasting room, open from 9 am. Sample wines from several local producers in one relaxed stop. Great casual warm-up before the day begins.

Graystone Winery — Port wine specialist in Clifton, opens 10 am. Conveniently right near TWP — two stops, one neighborhood, zero backtracking.

Sage Creations Organic Farm 🌿 — Not a winery but a stunning lavender farm on East Orchard Mesa, open 9 am–4 pm Thu–Sun. July is peak bloom for the tall lavandin stems — a beautiful, fragrant, completely sober way to start the day before the pours begin.

Or skip entirely — leave Basecamp late and head straight to TWP at 11.
11:00 am
🇿🇦
TWP Winery & Farmhouse
3334 F Rd, Clifton · (303) 875-9609
Boutique Tasting Charcuterie Lunch ✓ Reserved 11:00 am Peacocks & Goats
South African-inspired farmhouse winery owned by Shari & Edwin. The "Kaas en Vleis" charcuterie board is included with the tasting — a proper, leisurely lunch. Small batches, big personality. Watch for the roaming peacocks.
📞 (303) 875-9609 ✉ shari@twpwinery.com 🌐 twpwinery.com
1:00 pm
🥂
The Afternoon Flight — Choose Two
TerraVin: 349 W 8th St · BookCliff: 670 39th Rd · Cliff Dweller: 3674 G Rd · Ordinary Fellow: 202 Peach Ave
Choose Two ~75 min each
TerraVin Cellars — Boutique gem in downtown Palisade. Winemaker Corey's old & new world blends, open noon–8 pm. Build-your-own charcuterie available. · terravincellars.com

BookCliff Vineyards — 2x Governor's Cup winner, panoramic valley views, award-winning Albariño & Viognier. Open 11 am–7 pm. · bookcliffvineyards.com

Cliff Dweller Wine Co. — Natural winemaking, Moroccan lounge vibe, pet-friendly shaded patio. New to most of the group. Opens 2:00 pm Saturdays. · cliffdwellerwines.com

Ordinary Fellow — French varietals, rotating food trucks on a shaded patio. Opens noon. · ordinaryfellow.com
3:30 pm
🎸
Restoration Vineyards — Band in the Barrel
3594 E ½ Rd, Palisade · (970) 985-0832
Gonzales & Ritchen · 3:30–5:00 2+ Food Trucks — TBD Bottle & Glass Sales Only
The annual highlight — Gonzales & Ritchen perform live in the vineyard. Colorado Winery of the Year, surrounded by peach & cherry orchards with Grand Mesa views. Bottle and glass sales only during the concert. Bring lawn chairs or blankets — shade not guaranteed.
Vocalist Gonzales — former frontwoman of Peach Street Revival, Grand Junction Rockestra featured artist — channels Aretha, Etta James, and Chaka Khan with powerful elegance. Bassist Bill Ritchen brings Juilliard training and 35 years with the San Francisco Symphony, with credits spanning Steely Dan to the Allman Brothers.
▶ Magic Tree — Official Video
📞 (970) 985-0832 ✉ lbrauns@restorationvineyards.com 🌐 restorationvineyards.com 🎟 Manage on Tock 🎤 gonzalesmusic.com 🎵 Memento Mori on Apple Music
5:45 pm
🍕
Diorio's of Palisade — Pizza Pickup
309 W 8th St, Palisade · (970) 464-7966
Call Ahead ~4:45 pm Indian Butter Chicken Pies + Salads
NY-style pizza, open until 9 pm. Order ahead so everything's hot and ready. Quick stop — van stays running!
📞 (970) 464-7966
6:15 pm
🏊
Basecamp RV Resort — Pool & Pizza
985 N River Rd, Palisade · 1 mile from downtown
Pizza at the Pool Heated Pool thru Oct 15
The perfect ending — cold drinks, warm pizza, and a heated pool surrounded by orchards and vineyards along the Colorado River. 🌅
II
The Long Pour — A Late Start and a Long Finish
Five stops, two music venues, and TerraVin as a sunset sendoff
11:00 am
🇿🇦
TWP Winery & Farmhouse
3334 F Rd, Clifton · (303) 875-9609
Boutique Tasting Charcuterie Lunch Peacocks & Goats
Same great South African farmhouse start — "Kaas en Vleis" charcuterie board included with the tasting. Leisurely lunch pace, then head back into town.
📞 (303) 875-9609 ✉ shari@twpwinery.com 🌐 twpwinery.com
1:00 pm
🏔️
BookCliff Vineyards
670 39th Rd, Palisade · (303) 499-7301
Governor's Cup Winner Panoramic Views
2x Colorado Governor's Cup winner with spectacular valley views. Known for their Albariño and Viognier. A classic Palisade stop that never gets old. Open 11 am–7 pm.
📞 (303) 499-7301 ✉ winery@bookcliffvineyards.com 🌐 bookcliffvineyards.com
2:15 pm
🥂
The Afternoon Flight — Pick Your Pour
Cliff Dweller: 3674 G Rd · Ordinary Fellow: 202 Peach Ave, Palisade
Choose One Tasting Only — No Food
Cliff Dweller Wine Co. — Family-owned, natural winemaking, Moroccan lounge vibe and pet-friendly shaded patio. New to most of the group. Opens 2:00 pm Saturdays. · cliffdwellerwines.com

Ordinary Fellow — Craft winery focused on French varietals, rotating local food trucks on the shaded patio. Opens noon. · ordinaryfellow.com
3:30 pm
🎸
Restoration Vineyards — Band in the Barrel
3594 E ½ Rd, Palisade · (970) 985-0832
Gonzales & Ritchen · 3:30–5:00 2+ Food Trucks — TBD Bottle & Glass Sales Only
Gonzales & Ritchen on the vineyard lawn with food trucks and Grand Mesa views. 90 minutes of wine, music and sunshine. Bring chairs and blankets — shade not guaranteed.
Vocalist Gonzales — former frontwoman of Peach Street Revival, Grand Junction Rockestra featured artist — channels Aretha, Etta James, and Chaka Khan with powerful elegance. Bassist Bill Ritchen brings Juilliard training and 35 years with the San Francisco Symphony, with credits spanning Steely Dan to the Allman Brothers.
▶ Magic Tree — Official Video

5:30 pm
🌿
TerraVin Cellars
349 W 8th Street, Palisade 81526 · David Forenza & Corey (winemaker)
Boutique Tasting Evening Music — TBD
End the winery day at TerraVin as the valley cools down. Winemaker Corey's old & new world blends, open until 8 pm. A possible evening event or private tour with Corey could make this a memorable cap to the day — pending confirmation.
📞 David · (970) 390-2332 ✉ dforenza@gmail.com 📞 Corey · (970) 361-4046 ✉ corey.terravin@yahoo.com 🌐 terravincellars.com
7:15 pm
🍕
Diorio's of Palisade — Pizza Pickup
309 W 8th St, Palisade · (970) 464-7966
Call Ahead ~6:15 pm 2–3 Pizzas
NY-style pizza, open until 9 pm. Call from TerraVin about an hour before departure so pies are hot on arrival. Quick stop — van stays running! Note: if TerraVin has food available in the late afternoon/early evening, the group may opt to eat there instead and skip Diorio's pickup until later.
📞 (970) 464-7966
7:30 pm
🏊
Basecamp RV Resort — Pool & Pizza
985 N River Rd, Palisade · 1 mile from downtown
Pizza at the Pool Heated Pool thru Oct 15 ⚠️ Long Day — 5 Wineries
Hard-earned finish line — pizza, pool, and Colorado River views after a full five-stop day. 🌅
III
Two Stages, One Valley
Live music at Restoration, live music at TerraVin — the valley sings all day
11:00 am
🇿🇦
TWP Winery & Farmhouse
3334 F Rd, Clifton · (303) 875-9609
Boutique Tasting Charcuterie Lunch Peacocks & Goats
South African-inspired farmhouse winery — "Kaas en Vleis" charcuterie board included. Leisurely lunch, then on to the first stage of the day.
📞 (303) 875-9609 ✉ shari@twpwinery.com 🌐 twpwinery.com
1:00 pm
🎸
Restoration Vineyards — Band in the Barrel
3594 E ½ Rd, Palisade · (970) 985-0832
Gonzales & Ritchen · 1:00–2:30 2+ Food Trucks — TBD Reservation Change Pending — 1:00 pm Slot Bottle & Glass Sales Only
Gonzales & Ritchen — first stage of the day. 90 minutes of jazz and soul on the vineyard lawn with Grand Mesa views and food trucks. Earlier slot means more afternoon ahead. Bring chairs and blankets.
Vocalist Gonzales — former frontwoman of Peach Street Revival, Grand Junction Rockestra featured artist — channels Aretha, Etta James, and Chaka Khan with powerful elegance. Bassist Bill Ritchen brings Juilliard training and 35 years with the San Francisco Symphony.

The Afternoon Flight — Pick Your Pour
Ordinary Fellow: 202 Peach Ave · BookCliff: 670 39th Rd · Cliff Dweller: 3674 G Rd
Choose Two Tasting Only — No Food
Ordinary Fellow — Craft winery, French varietals, rotating food trucks on a shaded patio. Opens noon. · ordinaryfellow.com

BookCliff Vineyards — 2x Governor's Cup winner, panoramic valley views, award-winning Albariño & Viognier. Open 11 am–7 pm. · bookcliffvineyards.com

Cliff Dweller Wine Co. — Natural winemaking, Moroccan lounge, pet-friendly patio. New to most of the group. Opens 2 pm Saturdays. · cliffdwellerwines.com
📋 With TerraVin at 6 pm as the closer, you have roughly 3:30–5:30 pm for this stop — comfortable room for two tastings depending on the group's pace.
6:00 pm
🌿
TerraVin Cellars — Live Music & Pizza Truck
349 W 8th Street, Palisade 81526 · David Forenza & Corey (winemaker)
Live Music — 6:00 pm Pizza Food Truck On Site ✓ Confirmed · Events July 11
The second stage — live music and a pizza food truck right on site as the sun sets over the valley. Winemaker Corey's old & new world blends paired with an evening concert. Open until 8 pm. No need for a separate Diorio's stop — dinner is covered!
📞 David · (970) 390-2332 ✉ dforenza@gmail.com 📞 Corey · (970) 361-4046 ✉ corey.terravin@yahoo.com 🌐 terravincellars.com
8:00 pm
🏊
Basecamp RV Resort — Pool
985 N River Rd, Palisade · 1 mile from downtown
Heated Pool thru Oct 15
Wind down at the pool — dinner already handled at TerraVin. Colorado River views under the stars. 🌙
IV
Terroir Is Different for Everyone
A private winery tour, live music, and three ways to end the perfect day
"We don't actually put raspberries in the wine."— Rich Peña, Mayo Family Wines
11:00 am
🇿🇦
TWP Winery & Farmhouse
3334 F Rd, Clifton · (303) 875-9609
Boutique Tasting Charcuterie Lunch Peacocks & Goats
South African-inspired farmhouse winery — "Kaas en Vleis" charcuterie board included. A proper, leisurely lunch to set the tone for a day that's all about going deeper.
📞 (303) 875-9609 ✉ shari@twpwinery.com 🌐 twpwinery.com
1:00 pm
🍇
TerraVin Cellars — Private Winery Tour with Corey
349 W 8th Street, Palisade 81526
🍷 Private Tour — Winemaker Corey Norsworthy ~2 Hours · 1:00–3:00 pm
The centerpiece of this itinerary — a private behind-the-scenes tour of TerraVin led by winemaker and co-owner Corey. Walk the property, see the production process, and taste wines with the person who made them. An experience most guests never get.
📞 Corey · (970) 361-4046 ✉ corey.terravin@yahoo.com 🌐 terravincellars.com
3:30 pm
🎸
Restoration Vineyards — Band in the Barrel
3594 E ½ Rd, Palisade · (970) 985-0832
Gonzales & Ritchen · 3:30–5:00 2+ Food Trucks — TBD Bottle & Glass Sales Only
Gonzales & Ritchen on the vineyard lawn — the perfect complement to a day that started with a winemaker's tour. Grand Mesa views, food trucks, 90 minutes of jazz and soul. Bring chairs and blankets.
Vocalist Gonzales channels Aretha, Etta James, and Chaka Khan with powerful elegance. Bassist Bill Ritchen brings Juilliard training and 35 years with the San Francisco Symphony.
▶ Magic Tree — Official Video
📞 (970) 985-0832 ✉ lbrauns@restorationvineyards.com 🌐 restorationvineyards.com 🎟 Manage on Tock 🎤 gonzalesmusic.com
5:15 pm
🌅
The Evening Pour — Pick Your Pour
Carboy: 3572 G Rd · Sauvage Spectrum: Palisade · Or: Diorio's + Pool
Choose One — Group Decides ⚠️ Heads-up Required for Large Group
🎵 Carboy Mt. Garfield — Backyard Beats — Live music every Saturday 4–7 pm on the patio with Mt. Garfield views. Casual, fun, free music with wine and small bites. Call ahead for large group. · carboywinery.com

🍷 Sauvage Spectrum — Boutique winery with live music and events, open until 7 pm Saturdays. A quieter, more intimate close to the day. Call ahead for large group. · sauvagespectrum.com

🍕 Diorio's Pizza + Pool — The classic ending. Call ahead ~4:15 pm, order 3 Indian Butter Chicken pies and a couple of chef salads. Pool at Basecamp by 6 pm. (970) 464-7966 · 309 W 8th St

Garrett should call each selected stop 1–2 weeks before July 11.

🍇 Palisade, Colorado · Summer 2026 · Cheers to another great year 🥂
